title: Evaluate parallel loading for benchmark speedups
description: Prototype parallel discovery/index loading for Python and Rust and compare benchmark deltas. Keep deterministic ordering in results.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Parallel loading evaluation implemented in tools/benchmark_discovery.py (_parallel_load) and rust/src/bin/discovery_benchmark.rs (parallel variants). Deterministic ordering preserved via sorted paths and ordered results.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Parallel loading prototypes are measured against baseline and documented; ordering remains deterministic.
